latin: Nuntius Persarum Spartanis dixit: 'tot sunt sagittarii nostri ut sagittae eorum solem obscurent.' Leonidas risit et respondit: 'tum in umbra pugnabimus.' et trecenti Spartani in angustiis steterunt.

questions.prompt: What did the Persian messenger threaten?
questions.target: Their arrows would block out the sun
choices: Their arrows would block out the sun

questions.prompt: How many Spartans held the pass?

translation: A Persian messenger told the Spartans: 'Our archers are so many that their arrows darken the sun.' Leonidas laughed and replied: 'Then we shall fight in the shade.' And three hundred Spartans stood in the narrow pass.
